title: Huawei AP362E - WiFi6 indoor Dual Band AP, smart antenna
description: Huawei eKitEngine AP362E is a modern indoor access point (AP) that supports the Wi-Fi 6 (802.11ax) standard, delivering powerful and reliable wireless connectivity with a maximum transmission speed of up to 2.975 Gbps . This access point operates on both the 2.4 GHz (2x2 MIMO) and 5 GHz (2x2 MIMO) frequency bands, enabling simultaneous connections for multiple users with high signal quality and stable data transmission. Max. number of access users is 128, Huawei's recommendation is up to 100.… The installation of the Huawei eKitEngine AP362E is very straightforward and flexible, with the option to mount on the wall or ceiling using the included metal brackets. This access point supports various management and maintenance methods, whether through local management with EasyWeb or a local controller (WAC) , or via remote management through the HUAWEI eKit App and SNC platform. This flexibility simplifies network deployment, management, and subsequent maintenance With MU-MIMO technology, the AP362E enables simultaneous data transmission to multiple user devices, maximizing radio spectrum utilization and improving performance in environments with multiple connected users. Supporting a bandwidth of 160 MHz and 1024-QAM modulation, it delivers high-speed connectivity of up to 0.575 Gbps on the 2.4 GHz band and up to 2.4 Gbps on the 5 GHz band. This ensures smooth and fast data transmission, whether for video streaming, large file transfers, or online… The Huawei eKitEngine AP362E also features intelligent signal management through Beamforming technology, which automatically…
